name: Google Tasks Manager
description: Manage your Google Tasks - view, add, complete, and delete tasks with strikethrough animation

preferences.name: Google Tasks
preferences.description: Keyword to trigger Google Tasks extension

preferences.name: Default Task List
preferences.description: Task list to use for quick add (leave empty for first list)

preferences.name: Show Completed Tasks
preferences.description: Whether to show completed tasks in lists

preferences.name: Result Limit
preferences.description: Maximum number of tasks to show (leave empty for no limit)
